top_signals.title: Yen Hits Four-Decade Low in Historic Slide
top_signals.summary:
The yen slid to its weakest level against the dollar since 1986, a milestone that will generate unease in Japan and put traders on high alert for authorities wading into the market. Bloomberg's Ruth Carson explains the context.

 (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Cook, Welcome Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech At the State of Small Business Symposium hosted by the Federal Reserve Bank of Cleveland (via pre-recorded video)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Yen hits 40-year low against the dollar and breaks ¥162
top_signals.summary: The currency finally broke through the ¥161.96 mark against the dollar in New York before breaching ¥162 on Tuesday in Tokyo.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: How a Thai teen’s night at a Pattaya beach ended in death
top_signals.summary: A middle-aged Australian man has been arrested following the discovery of the body of the 17-year-old girl, which was found stuffed inside a suitcase dumped near a railway track.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Alibaba and Tencent dropped by DC lobbyists to comply with U.S. curbs
top_signals.summary: Under a new law, the Defense Department will be barred from working with any company represented by lobbyists who also work for entities blacklisted by the Pentagon.
